The '''Eriadu Way''',<ref name="GG">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040325web|text=Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin|int=Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin}}</ref> or '''Eriadu Bypass''',<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> was an old [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade route]] that ran thousands of [[Light-year/Legends|light-years]] to connect the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]] region to the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]]. The [[Nothoiin Corridor]], blazed through the [[Ivax Nebula/Legends|Ivax Nebula]] by [[Ecclessis Figg/Legends|Ecclessis Figg's]] explorers, connected the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] to the Eriadu Way. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it had become regarded as a part of the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]<ref name="GG" /> after so many [[Merchant/Legends|traders]] used it during the final century of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] that some [[Astrography|astrographers]] considered the Hydian Way to have "jumped" from its old course to the bypass through [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]].<ref name="GatORW" />
